narrative:
Lawrence Twp. township has 1,678 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
